study: Real-World Preliminary Experience With Responsive Neurostimulation in Pediatric Epilepsy: A Multicenter Retrospective Observational Study
age_notes: mean age at implant 16.6 ± 5 years; 17 patients <18 years
outcome_notes: 32 received therapy; 19/32 responders (>=50% seizure reduction); 2/32 seizure free

study: Responsive neurostimulation for treatment of pediatric refractory epilepsy: A pooled analysis of the literature
outcome_notes: median 75% seizure reduction at 12 months; postoperative complication rate 8.4%

study: Responsive Neurostimulation in Pediatric and Young Adult Patients With Drug-Resistant Focal, Multifocal, and Generalized Epilepsy: A Single-Center Experience
age_notes: age 5 to 21 years; pediatric n=22, young adult n=10
outcome_notes: 19/32 responders (59%) at mean 18.6 months; QOL improved in 15/32
